title: anisophyllum geyeri
intro: Anisophyllum geyeri, also known as Geyer's anisophyllum or Anisophyllum geyeri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Anisophyllum geyeri include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Anisophyllum geyeri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits.
